message:
fix(codegen): Fix exception type handling and builtin function access

- Use shared RuntimeExceptions map in isBuiltinTypeName for complete
  exception type coverage (fixes MemoryError not recognized)
- Add builtin function prefix (runtime.builtins.) in lambda closure
  expression generation (fixes isinstance undeclared in closures)
- Simplify isBuiltinTypeName by removing duplicate exception entries
  that are now covered by RuntimeExceptions map

These fixes address issues found while testing test_exception_group.py
